nodes.label: @anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk
nodes.rationale: Official Claude Agent SDK; query() in streaming-input mode. Backend owns each long-lived claude run in-process, injects user turns, and exposes worker tools as an in-process MCP server. No tmux for agents, no MCP channel race.

nodes.label: Dry-run safety model
nodes.rationale: Every external mutation routes through one injectable SystemAdapter so dev/test runs with zero side effects by default (KANBAN_DRY_RUN != 0); real mutations are gated behind KANBAN_DRY_RUN=0. bun run dev is a safe sandbox spawning no real claude and creating no git commits.

nodes.label: FakeSystemAdapter
nodes.rationale: Used whenever KANBAN_DRY_RUN != 0 (default). Logs intent, zero side effects, done() gate always passes, tmux tracked in memory. The dev/test path.

nodes.label: RealSystemAdapter
nodes.rationale: Only when KANBAN_DRY_RUN=0. Actually runs git/tmux/gh. Never instantiated in the dev/test path.

nodes.label: Composer 2.5 implementer path
nodes.rationale: Per-ticket implementer:composer has Claude plan, delegate code-writing to Cursor headless (templates/run_composer.sh, run in background and polled), then resume to review/test/commit/push/PR. Composer never commits; Claude owns all git.

nodes.label: Bun runtime
nodes.rationale: Runtime throughout: server, build, tests. SQLite via bun:sqlite.

nodes.label: No type casting convention
nodes.rationale: as/angle-bracket assertions are an eslint error (no-restricted-syntax); any is also an error. Validate with zod parse/safeParse, narrow with type guards, or use satisfies. tsconfig strict with noUncheckedIndexedAccess and verbatimModuleSyntax.
